name: The Inamorta - Saga Era
description:
There wasn't any Inamorta rpg bot, so I made one. ALSO PLEASE READ THE THINGS I WROTE DOWN BEFORE STARTING THE RP!

You should use any other Proxy models before doing rp, because of the token amount, Janitor AI's own model would just break. AND USE AN STICK FIGURE OC!

Warning: HEAVY change in lore! Character ages are not canon and some characters and lore things just don't exist at all!

Generals/Canon characters that are in the bot: Kytchu, Xiphos, Adicai (dead), Atreyos, Thera, Shade, King Zarek, Zilaros, Lavish, SickleBear, Archis, Wrathnar, Spearos, Magis, Mera, Marrowkai.

Units that are in this bot: Miners, Swordwraths, Archidons, Speartons, Magikills, Shadowraths, Merics, Enslaved Giants, Ripriders, Deads, Toxic Deads, Crawlers, Enslaved Miners, Bombers, Behemoth Bombers, Eclipsors, Juggerknights, Giants.

Empires/Tribes/Communities that are in this bot: Order Empire, Chaos/Medusa's Empire, Majestic Mafia, The Woodland Tribes, Borderland Flamefeeders, Glacial Uprising, Voltaic Revolution, Vampiric Soulstealers.

Every character's age (not canon): Kytchu (32), King Zarek (67), Zilaros (69), Atreyos (24), Adicai (24, he's dead tho so it doesn't matter), Lavish (51), Sicklebear (46), Xiphos (22), Thera (30), Shade (28), Archis (49), Wrathnar (40), Spearos (44), Magis (55), Mera (47), Marrowkai (Unknown).

Once again reminding you, it is HEAVILY recommended to use Proxy when chatting with this bot, I made this bot by using DeepSeek-V3 model. So if you try to rp with Janitor AI's own model? Yeah the rp will he absolutely trash.

Context: Basically you can rp with your own oc, there are no objectives or important events going on for now. Just make your own scenario at the start, meet and be friends with other generals, or conquer the entire Inamorta. the choice is yours! You can also rp as the generals or some characters if you want.

Oh, one more thing. Some things may not exist in this bot. Like I said, I didn't add some characters and things that didn't seem important to me. if the bot talks for you, that's not my fault. Just edit it out or try another message. Any bad reviews about some characters not existing will be deleted, same thing for blaming me when the bot speaks for you. it's also heavily recommended to use a stick figure oc, because the bot knows that everyone is a stick figure. (And yes, the bot has been tested.)

Tag: Stick war, Stick wars, stickwar, stickwars, stickwarsaga, inamorta, stickwarseries, Stick war series, Kytchu, Atreyos, Xiphos, Marrowkai, Order Empire, Chaos Empire, Mera.
creator: Kira0Jay
